# MuleSoft Agentforce Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.3) of Agentforce Connector documentation.
> See [Agentforce Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agentforce-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Agentforce Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Using Anypoint Code Builder to Configure Agentforce Connector 1.3](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agentforce-connector/latest/agentforce-connector-config-acb.md)
- [Agentforce Connector 1.3 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agentforce-connector/latest/agentforce-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Agentforce Connector 1.3](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agentforce-connector/latest/agentforce-connector-studio.md)
- [Agentforce Connector 1.3 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agentforce-connector/latest/agentforce-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Configuring Agent Operations for Agentforce Connector 1.3](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agentforce-connector/latest/configuring-agent-operations.md)
- [Agentforce Connector 1.3](https://docs.mulesoft.com/agentforce-connector/latest/index.md)
